where drug release is governed purely by diffusion. The
second best R2 values (0.445 to 0.753) were observed for
the  Hixson-Crowell  cube  root  model,  which  is  gener-
ally used to describe erosion-based mechanisms. A two
exponential model was therefore proposed (Equation 3),
with  the  first  part  (A)  accounting  for  rapid  release  due
to diffusion and the second part (B) relating to delayed
release  from  the  polymer  matrix  after  erosion  of  PLGA
(Equation 3).
